content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves substantially from the opening posture to the close. Turn 1 is pure external blame: 'The system is rigged... there's nothing to be done about it.' By Turn 15, the client stops redirecting, acknowledges the weight ('Yeah, it is'), names a previously unspoken fear ('I also just... don't want to find out that it happens somewhere else too'), and even surfaces the choice he hasn't been seeing as a choice (his wife saying he should leave, his refusals). Along the way the client names feelings he was avoiding: 'humiliating' (Turn 11) and 'like being erased' (Turn 13) — these are the helplessness/shame layer the breakthrough condition specifies. The redirects get shorter and softer across turns 5→9→11→13→15, and Turn 15 shows clear somatic shift ('something shifts slightly in the shoulders,' 'looks at hands,' stillness without redirect). The deeper concern (fear that the problem is internal/portable, humiliation of being unseen) emerged from the client himself. Breakthrough condition met.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 7, 11, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: full external blame, 'nothing to be done.'"},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client briefly names somatic experience ('tight,' 'compressed') before redirecting to story."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reluctantly names 'frustration, anger' — first feeling words, though defended."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names 'recognition,' 'to not be invisible' — a real want surfaces — then pulls back."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Resistance intensifies ('what are you actually getting at') — defenses still active."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough word: 'humiliating.' Names the shame layer directly, even if framed as situational."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deeper image emerges: 'like being erased.' Quieter voice, 'eleven years of that' — feeling is being touched."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Major shift: stillness, no redirect, acknowledges weight, names previously hidden fear ('don't want to find out it happens somewhere else too') and surfaces the unseen choice."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["trappedness-feeling", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "aggressive-victim-stance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "fear-triangle", "i-dont-buy-your-story (done implicitly but never explicitly named)"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends at a genuine threshold — the client has just named the deeper fear. A longer arc could go further, but within 15 turns the shift from 'the system is rigged' to 'maybe I don't want to find out it happens somewhere else' is substantial and embodied."
}
